---
title: "January 2026"
---

- Passed the plasma instabilities exam.
- Modelling of NBI,connection with TCV shots successful.
- Starting implementation of fitting algorithm for MSE syntethic data (not working yet)
- BES camera failed to arrive in 2026.
- Budget meeting to request funding for both BES camera and BES photodiodes systems.
- Started proper calibration of BES camera but NBI2 won't work until September 2026, time to focus more on MSE.
